events.title: High Press Detected
events.summary: Blue City are pressing the first pass and forcing rushed clearances.
events.analysis: The front line closes the center, waits for the fullback pass, and then jumps together to trap the buildup.
events.child_summary: Blue City are chasing the ball together so the other team cannot pass calmly.

events.title: Goal Disallowed For Offside
events.summary: The attacker was beyond the second-last defender when the pass was played.
events.analysis: The finish is ruled out because the receiving attacker started too early against the defensive line.
events.child_summary: The scorer ran a little too early before the pass.

events.title: Penalty Awarded
events.summary: The defender made contact before winning the ball and stopped the shot path.
events.analysis: The recovery run arrives late and clips the attacker before clean ball contact is possible.
events.child_summary: The defender hit the player first instead of getting the ball first.
